communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Official Military Personnel File (OMPF) for Thomas G. Otterbein.
Request copy of history of assignments NAVPERS form 1070/605, Legion of Merit award citations, Meritorious Service medal citation, Navy Commendation medal citations, navy achievement medal citations, Air Medal award citations, all award citations, Cumulative Record of Training (NAVPERS Form 5300/16), Transfers and Receipts NAVPERS 601-12 from 1970 to 2000, Administrative remarks NAVPERS 1070/613, all dates of promotions.
Please redact any personal information per Freedom of Information Act, U.S.C. § 552(b)(3) and U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).

VETERAN INFORMATION
Name of veteran: Thomas G. Otterbein 
Branch of service: United States Navy
Rank: CAPT
Service:  1970 to 2000

https://www.navysite.de/cruisebooks/cvn71-93/pdf/sample.pdf

operational tour with VF-111, his next sea tour was with Fighter Squadron 51. Otterbein was selected for F/A-18 Hornet training and subsequently became the XO of Fighter Squadron 161. Later CO of the Navy Fighter Weapons School (TOPGUN).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: Records related to River Parishes Community College Foundation

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records,  I am requesting copies of the following records in the possession, custody, or control of River Parishes Community College for the period July 1, 2025 through February 1, 2026:

1. Any records, including but not limited to emails and their attachments, contracts, agreements, memoranda of understanding, or scopes of work, that reference or relate to the River Parishes Community College Foundation.

2. Any records, including emails and attachments, reflecting or discussing financial transactions, transfers, funding, or reconciliations involving the River Parishes Community College Foundation, including any summaries, reports, or account reconciliations maintained or received by the college.

3. Any reports, audits, financial statements, presentations, or other documents received by, maintained by, or shared with the college regarding the River Parishes Community College Foundation.

To the extent possible, I request that searches include records maintained in email systems, shared drives, and other electronic storage systems used by the college. If any portion of these records is exempt from disclosure, please provide all segregable non-exempt portions and cite the specific legal authority for any redactions or withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Etienne Stats

title: Records related to the Delgado Foundation

communications.subject: Louisiana Public Records Law Request: Records related to the Delgado Foundation
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting access to and/or copies of the following records in the possession, custody, or control of Delgado Community College for the period July 1, 2025 through February 1, 2026:

1. Any records, including but not limited to emails and their attachments, contracts, agreements, memoranda of understanding, or scopes of work, that reference or relate to the Delgado Foundation.

2. Any records, including emails and attachments, reflecting or discussing financial transactions, transfers, funding, or reconciliations involving the Delgado Foundation, including any summaries, reports, or account reconciliations maintained or received by the college.

3. Any reports, audits, financial statements, presentations, or other documents received by, maintained by, or shared with the college regarding the Delgado Foundation.

To the extent possible, I request that searches include records maintained in email systems, shared drives, and other electronic storage systems used by the college. If any portion of these records is exempt from disclosure, please provide all segregable non-exempt portions and cite the specific legal authority for any redactions or withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Etienne Stats

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Untitled
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

Minutes of the Comprehensive Plan Update Committee meeting on January 21, 2026 indicate that two members of the Committee received flyers detailing a February 4, 2026 CNH “Visioning Workshop.” I would like to see a list of all HOAs  —and— all households that were sent the mentioned flyer.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Anonymous User
